title: Chapaev
writer: Dimitri Furmanov, Anna Furmanova, Sergey Vasilev
actors: Boris Babochkin, Boris Blinov, Varvara Myasnikova
plot: This film is based on the book about Vasili Ivanovich Chapaev (1887 - 1919) who was in real life the Commander of the 25th Division of the Red Army. Chapaev is an uneducated peasant and a decorated hero in the World War I and late...
